pages.text:
MINSTARS FREP YELISA HENETEAUMARSTUA

1000 Zagreb, A. Vukovar 78, P.P. 103 leton: 633-444, Telefaks: 442-07

KLASA: 303-03/94-01/42

UR.BRON: 525-01-94-02

Zagreb, 4. ožujka 1994.

Gospodinu Ministru

Ministarstvo vanjskih poslova

Republike Francuske

Direkcija politickin poslova

Sluzba Ujedinjenih naroda i

Medunarodnih organizacija 37 Quai d'Orsay

PARIs

Francuska

Gospodine Ministre,

za zaštitu bilja.

Molim Vas, gospodine Ministre, da primite uvjerenje o mor sobitom stovaniu.

Republika®

R7

REPUBLIKA HRVATSKA

INISTARSTVO POLJOPRIYREDEI SUMARSTV

MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND FORESTRY

41000 Zagreb, A. Vukovar 78, P.P. 1034

Telefon: 633-444, Telefaks: 442-070

NATIONS UNES

15. MAR, 1994)

ET CRCAMISATIONS INTERATIOBALES

Class: 303-03/94-01/42

Reg.No.: 525-01-94-02

In Zagreb, March 4, 1994

Theorist Hairs or Me Republic of France lead of Political Affairs

United Nations and International

Organizations Service 37 Quai d'Orsay 75700 PARIS

France

Sir,

I have the honour to advise you that the Republic of Croatia has decided to become a member of the European and Mediterranear

Plant Protection Organization, as a Government invited by the Council in conformity with Article Ill.a.2. of the EPPO Convention.

The Official delegate of Croatia to EPPO will be Mr. Vlasta Zlof coordinator of forecasting and diagnostic service in the Institute for

Plant Protection.

I remain,

Yours faithfully,

MINISTER

an Tarnai
